tagline: Cloud & Data Engineer building ETL pipelines, streaming systems, and AI-integrated applications on AWS and Azure.
description: Cloud & Data Engineer with 3+ years delivering cloud-native ETL pipelines, streaming systems, and AI-integrated applications. MS Data Science @ University at Buffalo.

roles.detailed: Cloud & Data Engineer | Python, SQL, AWS, PySpark, Kafka | Open to Summer 2026 & Full-Time Roles

bio: Cloud & Data Engineer with 3+ years delivering cloud-native ETL pipelines, streaming systems, and AI-integrated applications on AWS and Azure. Achieved 40% throughput gains, 65% faster batch runtimes, and 99.8% uptime. Currently contributing to deepfake detection research at the Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, University at Buffalo, under Prof. Siwei Lyu (IEEE Fellow). Experienced with Python, SQL, PySpark, Kafka, Airflow, AWS, Azure, Snowflake, Flask, FastAPI, Docker, Tableau, and Power BI. Open to Data Engineering, Data Science, and Software Engineering roles.

education.school: University at Buffalo, The State University of New York
highlights: Pursuing graduate studies in data science with focus on machine learning, statistical modeling, and large-scale analytics.
Graduate Research Assistant at the Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Data Science under Prof. Siwei Lyu (IEEE Fellow).
Building production ETL pipelines, PySpark workflows, ML inference systems, and MLOps practices for deepfake detection research.
coursework: Introduction to Probability Theory for Data Science (EAS502)

highlights: Four-year undergraduate program in computer science and engineering.
President, CSI Student Chapter — led technical workshops, industry sessions, and student initiatives.

Built strong foundation in algorithms, software engineering, databases, and systems programming.
Completed intermediate education in Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry (MPC stream).
Built academic foundation for engineering entrance preparation and undergraduate studies.
Recognized for consistent academic performance during pre-university coursework.
Completed Secondary School Certificate (SSC) with top academic performance.
Secured 1st rank at Mandal and District level in SSC examination (2016).
INSPIRE Award recipient — national-level recognition for innovation and academic excellence.

experience.company: Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Data Science
bullets: Developed React, Flask, and Jinja frontend/backend components for AI-driven application workflows.
Built REST APIs for real-time ML inference; reduced latency from 580ms to 378ms (+28% throughput).
Engineered PySpark workflows on 100GB+ datasets; cut runtime by 60% via partitioning and broadcast joins.
Architected Python ETL pipelines ingesting 50K+ multi-modal records into AWS S3 for Deep-O-Meter.
Implemented MLflow versioning and data lineage across 10+ configs; reduced QA effort by 30%.
experience.desc: Research at the Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, University at Buffalo, under Prof. Siwei Lyu (IEEE Fellow).

Instituted CI/CD test suites across 15+ workflows, cutting post-deployment defects by 40%.
experience.desc: Enterprise cloud data engineering, SOX-compliant pipelines, and production observability.

bullets: Built Python ETL pipelines ingesting 500K+ records from 10+ sources; reduced processing time by 45%.
Designed relational schemas and indexing strategies; improved query performance by 60%.
Developed 15+ Tableau and Power BI dashboards; reduced manual reporting by 6 hrs/week.
Implemented data validation frameworks ensuring 99.5% accuracy across 2M+ records.
experience.desc: End-to-end data pipelines, analytics dashboards, and database optimization for clients.

projects.title: Deep-O-Meter
projects.subtitle: Deepfake Detection Platform
projects.context: Live research at the Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, UB — Flask/FastAPI APIs, PySpark ETL, and MLflow model versioning under Prof. Siwei Lyu.
projects.desc: Production deepfake detection inference platform at the Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, University at Buffalo, with containerized REST APIs, S3 integration, and MLflow versioning.

projects.title: Airflow Data Pipelines
projects.subtitle: Workflow Orchestration
projects.context: Automates ETL workflows I previously ran manually — 98% SLA compliance, saving 20+ hours/week of pipeline operations.
projects.desc: Automated workflow platform with Airflow DAGs, retry logic, and monitoring. Achieved 98% SLA compliance and eliminated manual pipeline operations.

projects.title: Azure Data Factory ETL
projects.subtitle: Cloud ETL Pipelines
projects.context: Pairs with my Azure AZ-900 & AI-900 certifications — multi-source cloud ETL with parameterized datasets and monitoring.
projects.desc: Azure Data Factory pipelines orchestrating multi-source ETL workflows with parameterized datasets, triggers, and monitoring for cloud analytics.

projects.title: PySpark Processing
projects.subtitle: Distributed Big Data
projects.context: Directly related to my UB research — 100GB+ datasets with partitioning and broadcast joins cutting runtime by 60%+.
projects.desc: PySpark jobs processing large datasets with adaptive partitioning, broadcast joins, and optimized transformations for 60%+ runtime improvements.

projects.title: Recommendation System
projects.subtitle: Collaborative Filtering
projects.context: Modular ML pipeline showcasing collaborative filtering — part of my GitHub Project repo for data science roles.
projects.desc: Recommendation engine using collaborative filtering and content-based methods with evaluation metrics and modular pipeline design.

projects.title: Graph ML Fraud Detection
projects.subtitle: Network-Based ML
projects.context: Graph-based fraud detection using network features — published in my SOFTWARE-ENGINEERING-Projects repository on GitHub.
projects.desc: Graph-based ML pipeline detecting fraudulent transactions using network analysis, feature engineering, and supervised classification.

projects.title: Web Scraping Pipeline
projects.subtitle: Data Collection ETL
projects.context: End-to-end ingestion pipeline — validates, deduplicates, and loads structured data into PostgreSQL for downstream analytics.
projects.desc: Automated web scraping pipeline ingesting structured data from multiple sources with validation, deduplication, and database loading.

projects.title: Financial Forecasting
projects.subtitle: Time Series ML
projects.context: Applies MS Data Science coursework and scikit-learn/XGBoost skills to revenue and trend prediction use cases.
projects.desc: Financial forecasting models with feature engineering, cross-validation, and ensemble methods for revenue and trend prediction.

projects.title: Analytics Dashboard
projects.subtitle: Business Intelligence
projects.context: Built during freelance analytics work — 15+ Tableau & Power BI dashboards reducing manual reporting by 6 hrs/week.
projects.desc: Interactive analytics dashboard with KPI tracking, drill-down visualizations, and automated reporting reducing manual effort by 6 hrs/week.

projects.title: AI Data Analyst Chatbot
projects.subtitle: Natural Language to SQL
projects.context: Built as part of my generative AI portfolio — turning business questions into SQL using LangChain and OpenAI, aligned with my data analyst certifications.
projects.desc: AI chatbot that converts natural-language questions into SQL queries. Includes NL-to-SQL pipeline, interactive data exploration, prompt engineering, and analytics dashboards.

projects.title: RAG Document Q&A System
projects.subtitle: Retrieval Augmented Generation
projects.context: Combines my NLP interest with production-style retrieval — FAISS vector search and LangChain pipelines similar to tools I use in UB research workflows.
projects.desc: RAG-based document Q&A with FAISS vector search, LangChain retrieval pipelines, and a web UI for uploading documents and asking natural language questions.

projects.title: Real-Time Streaming Platform
projects.subtitle: Kafka + Spark + AWS
projects.context: Mirrors my Broadridge experience processing 200+ files/day — designed for 500K+ events/hour with sub-2s latency on AWS.
projects.desc: Production-style streaming platform ingesting 500K+ events/hour via Kafka, processing with Spark Streaming windowed aggregations, and storing in AWS S3 with sub-2s latency.

projects.title: Kafka Streams Examples
projects.subtitle: Event-Driven Architecture
projects.context: Hands-on reference implementations I use to demonstrate event-driven patterns in interviews and portfolio reviews.
projects.desc: Hands-on Kafka Streams examples covering producers, consumers, windowed aggregations, and fault-tolerant event processing patterns.

projects.title: Sentiment Analysis
projects.subtitle: NLP Classification
projects.context: NLP project using text preprocessing and classification — complements my IBM Data Science & analyst certifications.
projects.desc: NLP pipeline for sentiment classification with text preprocessing, vectorization, and model evaluation on real-world review datasets.
